n: The Adventures of Stomper the Pony

steps.t: Stomper the pony has fled into the western Wildwood. You should look for signs of Stomper's flight.
Hoof-prints may be found in the Wildwood. You should look for more prints from Stomper the pony.
Hoof-prints may be found in the Wildwood. You should look for more prints from Stomper the pony.
Minda is in the western Wildwood. You should talk to Minda Heathertoes.
Minda can be found in the western Wildwood. You should talk to Minda Heathertoes.
Minda can be found near a pond in the central Wildwood. You should talk to Minda Heathertoes.
